description.value:
Send Medication data TA building blocks for patient P. XXX_Schut
For more info: https://informatiestandaarden.nictiz.nl/wiki/mp:V3.0.0_kwalificatie_medicatiegegevens_sturen_TA
Original description: KWAL Medicatiegegevens TA script 1
Send Medication data TA resources in a transaction Bundle
Test client to POST a Bundle of type transaction.
Checks if all resources specified by the scenario can be identified unambiguously.

expression.value: Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationDispense).where((( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '3060195') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '59366') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '112984') ))).where(modifierExtension.where(url = 'http://nictiz.nl/fhir/StructureDefinition/ext-StopType').exists().not()).where(extension.where(url = 'http://nictiz.nl/fhir/StructureDefinition/ext-AdministrationAgreement.ReasonModificationOrDiscontinuation').exists().not()).count() = 3

Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationDispense).where((( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '3060195') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '59366') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '112984') ))).where(modifierExtension.where(url = 'http://nictiz.nl/fhir/StructureDefinition/ext-StopType').value.coding.code = '410546004').count() = 3

Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationDispense).where((( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '3060195') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '59366') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '112984') ))).where(extension.where(url = 'http://nictiz.nl/fhir/StructureDefinition/ext-AdministrationAgreement.ReasonModificationOrDiscontinuation').value.coding.code = '58848006').count() = 3

description.value: Confirm that the request Bundle contains 1 Medication resource that contains code '3060195|urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.4.7' (ECANSYA TABLET FILMOMHULD 500MG)
